# Resource Manager API, gRPC: WorkspaceService.UndeleteWorkspace

Restores a previously soft-deleted workspace.

## gRPC request

```proto
rpc UndeleteWorkspace (UndeleteWorkspaceRequest) returns (Operation)
```

The method starts a long-running operation.

- Response type: `WorkspaceOperationResponse`
- Metadata type: `WorkspaceOperationMetadata`

## UndeleteWorkspaceRequest

Request to restore an archived workspace.

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Required. Stable unique identifier of the workspace to restore.<br/>The value must be a valid UUID string. |

## google.longrunning.Operation

Long-running operation returned by asynchronous API methods.

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "done": true,
  "error": {},
  "response": {}
}
```
